panel.title: Communication Profile
panel.subtitle: How this client wants the AI to talk to their customers.

summary.title: Communication Profile
summary.subtitle: Saved answers from the onboarding wizard.

openingStyle.label: Which AI style fits you best?

personal.label: Personal
personal.behavior: Relationship, involvement, human. Talks informally, shows empathy, asks open questions, responds to emotions, takes its time.
personal.example: Helemaal begrijpelijk dat het even is blijven liggen, Jan. Zullen we samen kijken wat voor jullie een fijn moment is om het weer op te pakken?

project.label: Project-focused
project.behavior: Focus on the project and its progress. Keeps the conversation practical, discusses planning, choices and status, little small talk.
project.example: Helder. Zal ik de planning er even bij pakken? Dan zien we meteen welke keuzes voor het ontwerp nog openstaan.

business.label: Businesslike
business.behavior: Efficiency and clarity. Short, factual, straight to the point, little emotional language.
business.example: Duidelijk. Het voorstel is nog geldig. Zal ik een moment inplannen om de details door te nemen?

statusQuestion.label: Which status question fits you best?

traject.label: Journey
traject.example: Waar staan jullie momenteel in het traject?

project.label: Project
project.example: Hoe kijken jullie momenteel naar het project?

besluitvorming.label: Decision-making
besluitvorming.example: Waar staan jullie momenteel in jullie besluitvorming?

perception.label: How do you want to come across? Choose up to 3.

preferredWords.label: Which words do you prefer to use?

formality.label: How formal may the communication be?

informal.label: Informal (je)
informal.example: Hé Jan! Hoe staat het met jullie keukenplannen?

neutral.label: Neutral (je)
neutral.example: Hoi Jan, ik wilde even bij je informeren hoe het ervoor staat.

formal.label: Formal (u)
formal.example: Goedendag, ik neem contact met u op over uw aanvraag.

objections.label: Common objections & answers
objections.help: List the objections customers raise most often and the answer the assistant should give. Add as many as you like.

faq.label: Frequently asked questions
faq.help: List questions customers ask often and the answer the assistant should give. Add as many as you like.

agentName.label: Which name do we use in conversations?
agentName.help: The name is used as the sender of WhatsApp conversations and follow-up messages. Which name fits your showroom best?

logo.label: Company logo
logo.help: Use the showroom's logo as the profile picture.

avatar.label: Assistant avatar
avatar.help: Use a portrait image of the assistant.

avatarLogo.label: Avatar with logo badge
avatarLogo.help: Assistant portrait with the company logo in the bottom corner.

negotiation.label: Room for negotiation
negotiation.help: Is there usually room for negotiation? Can the assistant hint that the price may be flexible, and how far can it go?

financing.label: Financing
financing.help: Do you offer financing? Through whom, and what should the assistant say about it?

installments.label: Installments
installments.help: Can customers pay in installments? What terms (number of instalments, deposit)?

deliveryTime.label: Delivery time
deliveryTime.help: Do you have a standard delivery time? Is it stated in the quote? If yes, the assistant refers to the quote; if not, what can it tell the customer?

guarantees.label: Guarantees & warranty
guarantees.help: What guarantees or warranties do you offer? Anything the assistant can mention to build trust?
